codeReview.summary: The API client implements all required endpoints, auth header injection, and refresh-on-401 retry behavior, with comprehensive mocked-fetch tests validating requests and error handling. No functional defects found.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Mobile Jest tests should live under src/__tests__ (or src/test-utils) to avoid inclusion in apps/mobile tsconfig; this placement rule is not called out in AGENTS.md or library notes.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: apps/mobile/tsconfig.json excludes src/__tests__/ and src/test-utils; transcript shows the worker moved a test from src/api/client.test.ts to src/__tests__/api/client.test.ts after tsc failures.

summary: Pass: client and tests align with gateway endpoints and auth refresh flow; no code issues identified.
